summary: Testing blocked by critical infrastructure issues. Neither frontend nor backend are accessible via public URL due to missing nginx reverse proxy configuration.

critical_bugs.issue: Backend API endpoints returning 404 via public URL
critical_bugs.root_cause: Missing nginx reverse proxy configuration to forward /api/* requests to port 8001
critical_bugs.evidence: Backend works locally (curl localhost:8001/api/health returns 200) but public URL returns 404

critical_bugs.issue: No external access to backend services
critical_bugs.impact: Complete backend functionality blocked from public access
critical_bugs.details: Public URL shows generic 404, internal port 8001 not exposed via nginx

critical_bugs.issue: Public URL shows 'Preview Unavailable' instead of application
critical_bugs.root_cause: Missing nginx configuration to proxy frontend requests to port 3000
critical_bugs.evidence: Frontend runs locally (localhost:3000 returns 200) but public URL shows Emergent preview unavailable page

critical_bugs.issue: Frontend build errors referencing missing Supabase imports
critical_bugs.details: Build logs show 'Failed to resolve import ../lib/supabase' suggesting incomplete migration

infrastructure_issues.issue: No nginx reverse proxy configuration for application
infrastructure_issues.details: Only nginx-code-server.conf exists, no config for frontend/backend proxy

success_percentage.backend: 0% - All API endpoints inaccessible via public URL
success_percentage.frontend: 0% - Application not loading via public URL

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Configure nginx reverse proxy to serve application. Need nginx config to: 1) Proxy root path (/) to frontend port 3000, 2) Proxy /api/* paths to backend port 8001, 3) Fix any remaining Supabase import references causing frontend build failures. Both frontend and backend services are running locally but not accessible via public URL.
